description: Composition Black scooped neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, fabric tape lining on the inside of the neck and chest print Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Bruce Springsteen once sang, "Blinded By The Light", for all the once-lost souls in us. It might not have been a chartbuster in his times, but it has definitely remained with all of us for several years, after the release of his debut album featuring this composition. You be a Springsteen fan or not, this tee will definitely go down well with you because we are sure that you are definitely one among the million thoughtful souls in this world. Pair this tee with denims and slip-on shoes for a girlie look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 5'7" Chest: 33" Waist: 25"
